meta_title: Private Blood Tests in Preston | Results Explained by Your GP
meta_description: Comprehensive blood tests and health screening in Fulwood, Preston. Results explained personally by Dr Faizal Secretary. Same-week appointments.
hero_h1: Private Blood Tests in Preston — Know Your Numbers.
hero_sub: Comprehensive blood tests and health screening in Fulwood, Preston — with results explained personally by Dr Faizal Secretary. Not just emailed over and left for you to Google.
hero_trust: From £119 · Results Explained Personally · Same-Week Available
intro_quote: Your blood test results arrived. The portal says 'abnormal'. Nobody calls.
intro_heading: Private Blood Tests in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: Blood tests are only as useful as the person who explains them. At My Private Clinic, Dr Faizal Secretary reviews your results with you in person — so you understand what they mean and what to do next.
intro_para_2: Comprehensive health panels, Well Man and Well Woman checks, thyroid, diabetes, cholesterol, iron, vitamins and more — all tailored to what you actually need.

faqs.question: What blood tests do you offer?
faqs.answer: Full blood count, liver function, kidney function, thyroid, HbA1c (diabetes), cholesterol, iron studies, vitamin B12, vitamin D, testosterone, PSA and more. Panels tailored to your needs.

faqs.question: How quickly will I get my results?
faqs.answer: Most blood test results are returned within 2–5 working days. Dr Secretary reviews them personally and will contact you to discuss.

faqs.question: Do I need a consultation as well?
faqs.answer: Yes. All blood tests are ordered and interpreted as part of a consultation. This ensures the right tests are run and results are explained properly.

faqs.question: What is a Well Man / Well Woman check?
faqs.answer: A comprehensive health screen covering heart health, diabetes risk, liver and kidney function, thyroid, vitamins and hormones — giving you a complete picture of your health.
